nodes.label: pi-vimmode Context
nodes.rationale: pi-vimmode brings Vim-style modal editing to Pi prompt input. This glossary names the prompt-editing concepts that must stay precise across docs, specs, and tests. ## Language

nodes.label: Language
nodes.rationale: **Prompt buffer**: The current editable prompt text and cursor space inside Pi input. It is not a file buffer and does not imply persistence beyond the editor session. _Avoid_: File buffer, document buffer

nodes.label: Example dialogue
nodes.rationale: Developer: “Should this hardening change add search?” Domain expert: “No prompt search. It may verify existing line-local character search if the docs already claim it.” Developer: “So `f/F/t/T` belongs to line-local character search, while `/`, `?`, `n`, and `N` belong to prompt search?”
